content.text: based on what you've told me before, mira's bedtime window is **7:30 pm**, and her wind-down routine goes in this order: **bath → story → lights out**. the consistency of that sequence is the real work here — at 4 months, babies start to recognize predictable cues that signal sleep is coming, so running the same three steps in the same order helps her nervous system downshift even before she's in the crib. if you ever want to layer in something extra (like the blue elephant at the start of the routine, since she already associates it with calm at naps), that's an easy addition that could reinforce the wind-down signal further.
